productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Black Casual Shoes
description: An absolutely cool casual shoe, this pair from numero uno is a great addition to your wardrobe. The all black uppers with red accents in a classic silhouette creates a strong impression. Team this with jeans and t-shirts for great urban style.UpperSynthetic leather upper with overlays for durability and comfortRubber toe box for greater protection to the toesLace-ups for a snug FitCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for added comfortBrand logo printed on the side of the heel, brand seal embedded on the side and brand name embossed on the tongueMidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorption and all day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole in textured woven pattern on the forefoot and heel for maximum durability and tractionBuilt up textured heel counter for greater protection to the heelShoe careWipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
